hero.subtext: From tech summits and concerts to cultural festivals and workshops — find it, book it, and get your ticket in seconds.

home.headlineGatheringsSub: Curated premium activations commanding top regional stage presence across Addis Ababa and secondary high-growth hubs.
home.browseByCategorySub: Filter dynamic multi-tier programming spanning industrial engineering, artistic showcases, and executive roundtables.
home.nationalLiveRegistrySub: Real-time synchronized schedules across our enterprise fallback array.
home.threeStepFunnelSub: Designed for maximum checkout velocity and persistent local ticket accessibility.
home.step1Desc: Filter our resilient caching grid by temporal targets, sub-city bounds, or free/paid parameters.
home.step2Desc: Complete transaction streams in under 30 seconds using unified local telephony validation tokens.
home.step3Desc: Present client-rendered cryptographic QR matrix patterns at the gate. No roaming connectivity required.
home.deployToday: Deploy Your Custom Bounded Event Context Today
home.deployBody: Tap into advanced telemetry analytics, integrated attendee multi-tier ticket models, and dedicated enterprise application scopes.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to your Eventology account
auth.signupSubtitle: Join Eventology to discover and register for events
auth.agreeToTerms: I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
auth.redirectedTo: You'll be redirected to {{path}} after sign in.

events.title: Events
events.subtitle: Discover amazing events happening in Addis Ababa
events.tryDifferentFilters: Try adjusting your filters or search terms
events.featuredEmptyBody: Featured events will appear here once the admin team pins them.

organizer.title: Organizers
organizer.noEventsBody: Create your first event to start gathering registrations.
organizer.scannerSubtitle: Point the camera at the attendee's QR code.
organizer.scannerManual: Or paste the QR payload below

notifications.pageDescription: Choose how and where you want to hear from us.
notifications.deliveryChannelsDesc: We'll always send important transactional updates (registrations, payments) — but you can opt out of marketing messages.
notifications.emailDesc: Tickets, payment receipts, and event reminders.
notifications.smsDesc: Last-minute event changes and check-in codes.
notifications.marketingDesc: We'll never share your data. Marketing emails include event recommendations and platform news.
notifications.marketingEmailsDesc: Recommendations, featured events, and platform news.
notifications.languageDesc: The language used for notification messages.
notifications.emptyHint: All notifications are off. Enable at least one channel to receive updates.

registrationConfirmed.subject: You're going to {{event}}!

ticketIssued.subject: Your ticket for {{event}}

paymentCompleted.subject: Payment confirmed for {{event}}
paymentCompleted.emailBody:
Hi {{name}},

We've received your payment of {{amount}} {{currency}} for {{event}}.

Receipt: {{receiptUrl}}

— The Eventology team

refundProcessed.subject: Refund processed for {{event}}
refundProcessed.emailBody:
Hi {{name}},

Your refund of {{amount}} {{currency}} for {{event}} has been processed. Funds typically appear within 5–10 business days, depending on your bank.

Reason: {{reason}}

— The Eventology team

payoutUpdate.subject: Payout {{status}}: {{amount}} {{currency}}
payoutUpdate.emailBody:
Hi {{name}},

Your payout of {{amount}} {{currency}} is now {{status}}.

Reference: {{reference}}

— The Eventology team

footer.aboutText: Addis Ababa's premier event discovery and registration platform.
footer.ctaDescription: From tech conferences at the African Union to cultural festivals in Piazza — find your next experience on Eventology.

errors.notFoundText: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.

errors.serverErrorText: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again later.

ai.needHumanMsg: I can connect you with our support team.
ai.insightsSubtitle: Generate a narrative summary of this event's performance.
ai.rateLimited: Too many AI requests. Try again shortly.

payments.comingSoonBody: Paid tickets and payouts are paused during the MVP. The moment payments go live, this surface returns automatically.
payments.ticketsOnSaleSoonBody: Payments are temporarily disabled. The organizer is preparing ticket sales — check back shortly.
payments.noticeBody: Free registration is open. Paid tickets will be available shortly.

orgBecome.title: Become an Organizer
orgBecome.description: Create events, manage registrations, and grow your audience on Eventology.
orgBecome.benefit1: Create and publish events in minutes
orgBecome.benefit2: Track registrations and attendance in real time
orgBecome.benefit3: Reach thousands of attendees in Addis Ababa
orgBecome.note: Your organizer profile will be reviewed by our team. You can start creating events immediately.
orgBecome.successBody: Redirecting you to the organizer dashboard...
orgBecome.statusPendingBody: Our team is reviewing your organizer application. You'll be notified by email and in the app once it's verified — then you can start creating events.
orgBecome.statusVerifiedBody: Your organizer account has been approved. You can now create and publish events on Eventology.
orgBecome.statusRejectedBody: Unfortunately your organizer application was not approved at this time.
